headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Align Technology (ALGN) After Recent Share Price Rebound?
summary: Wondering if Align Technology at around US$190 per share still offers value or if the easy gains are gone? This article focuses squarely on what the current price might mean for you. The stock has returned 9.8% over the last week and 30 days, 21.8% year to date and 10.9% over the past year, but those figures sit alongside a 46.5% decline over 3 years and a 69.3% decline over 5 years. These mixed returns give important context for anyone assessing what the current valuation might be pricing...
